site.title: Equity Analyst
site.tagline: 15-question equity reviews · Be honest, not clever.

screens.title: India · Mid-Cap · Boring Cash Machines · May 2026

stocks.name: Uber Technologies, Inc.
stocks.summary: A good business at a fair price — not a great business at a great price.

stocks.name: HDFC Bank Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Best private bank — best CASA, lowest credit costs, deepest distribution.
stocks.valueAngle: ~2.5× P/B vs historical 3.5×; merger overhang clearing.

stocks.name: State Bank of India
stocks.thesis: India's largest bank — ROA 1%+, ROE 16–18%, deep PSU value.
stocks.valueAngle: ~1.4–1.6× P/B adj for subsidiaries; classic PSU-bank value.

stocks.name: Tata Consultancy Services
stocks.thesis: IT cash factory — $30B+ rev, ~50% ROE, near-100% FCF conversion.
stocks.valueAngle: ~22× vs historical 28–30×; AI cannibalisation fear is overdone.

stocks.name: ITC Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Tobacco cash machine funding FMCG scale-up; hotels demerged.
stocks.valueAngle: ~25× P/E + 3.5% dividend yield; ROCE 35%+.

stocks.name: Asian Paints Ltd.
stocks.thesis: #1 paints (~50% share) with the most-feared dealer network in consumer India.
stocks.valueAngle: De-rated ~35–40% on Birla Opus fears; ~50× vs historical 65–70×.

stocks.name: Bajaj Auto Ltd.
stocks.thesis: 2W/3W leader with most geo-diversified franchise in Indian auto (50%+ exports).
stocks.valueAngle: ~22× earnings, ₹15,000Cr net cash, EV ramping profitably.

stocks.name: Larsen & Toubro Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Engineering champion — ₹5L Cr order book; defense + Middle East EPC.
stocks.valueAngle: Core-EPC at ~22× ex IT/financial subs; ME orderbook re-acceleration.

stocks.name: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries
stocks.thesis: #1 India pharma; specialty (Ilumya, Cequa, Winlevi) scaling.
stocks.valueAngle: ~28× earnings; market under-weights specialty earnings durability.

stocks.name: Coal India Ltd.
stocks.summary: Cheap monopoly cash machine — 9× P/E, 5.7% yield, 35% ROCE. Climate-tail risk priced in.

stocks.name: Maruti Suzuki India Ltd.
stocks.thesis: PV leader (~40% share); deepest distribution; Suzuki tech parent.
stocks.valueAngle: ~25× earnings; SUV refresh + export ramp under-appreciated; net cash ₹50,000Cr+.

stocks.name: Vinati Organics Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Global #1 in ATBS (~65% share) + IBB — process-IP moat, debt-free, founder-led (Vinati Saraf Mutreja).
stocks.valueAngle: ~32× P/E vs 10y avg 38×; downstream butyl-phenol & antioxidant capacity ramping FY27.

stocks.name: Caplin Point Laboratories Ltd.
stocks.thesis: LATAM-focused generics with first-mover share in Central/South America; US injectables ramp via Caplin Steriles.
stocks.valueAngle: ~22× P/E + 25%+ ROCE + debt-free + decade of unbroken FCF; US ramp is free optionality.

stocks.name: Affle (India) Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Mobile-first ad-tech with proprietary intent data; CPC pricing insulates from CPM compression.
stocks.valueAngle: ~50× P/E rich but 4y revenue CAGR 30%+ at 25% EBITDA margin, net-cash; MENA & US monetisation early.

stocks.name: Suprajit Engineering Ltd.
stocks.thesis: World's largest auto control-cable maker — supplies Honda, Yamaha, Bajaj globally; EV-agnostic product.
stocks.valueAngle: ~24× P/E + 18% ROCE; Sundaram cable-biz acquisition expands SAM; hidden champion in a boring niche.

stocks.name: eClerx Services Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Sticky digital-ops to enterprise BFSI / cable / hi-tech; founder-promoted (Mundhra, Malik); aggressive buybacks.
stocks.valueAngle: ~18× P/E — cheapest among listed BPM/KPO peers; net-cash; 20%+ EBITDA margins through wage cycle.

stocks.name: Mold-Tek Packaging Ltd.
stocks.thesis: IML plastic-packaging leader for India paints, lubes, ghee, ice-cream — tool-mould switching cost is real.
stocks.valueAngle: ~22× P/E + 20%+ ROCE + net-cash; 30%+ F&B mix (margin-rich); Birla Opus paint launch is a tailwind, not headwind.

stocks.name: Petronet LNG Ltd.
stocks.thesis: India's largest LNG regas operator (Dahej + Kochi terminals, ~75% national capacity). Take-or-pay tolling model = recurring earnings.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 10.1× · Div yield 3.7% · ROE 18.6% · D/E 0.11 — cheapest in pass-list.

stocks.name: Computer Age Management Services
stocks.thesis: MF RTA duopoly with KFin (~70% AUM share). Asset-light fee-per-folio model scales with AUM growth.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 41× rich but ROE 38.7% + 40% op margins justify quality premium. Buy on pull-back.

stocks.name: Abbott India Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Abbott (USA) 75% — top-tier MNC governance. Branded portfolio (Digene, Thyronorm, Cremaffin); India domestic INR revenues.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 38× full but net cash + ROE 34.5% + 30% op margins. Branded-Rx moat real.

stocks.name: Nippon Life India AMC
stocks.thesis: 5th-largest AMC (~₹6L Cr AUM); Nippon Life Japan 73%. SIP-led inflow franchise.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 47× rich but op margin 65% + ROE 34.5%. Buy on 25%+ correction.

stocks.name: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC
stocks.thesis: 7th-largest AMC; ABG + Sun Life JV. Cheaper-quality cousin to NAM-INDIA / HDFCAMC.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 30.6× · ROE 25% · Op margin 52% · Div yield 2.3% — best value/quality in the AMC tier.

stocks.name: Ajanta Pharma Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Family-promoter (Agrawal, 70%) pharma — emerging-markets branded generics + India derma/cardio.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 38× full but ROE 25%; 70% promoter alignment + EM-export mix.

stocks.name: Dr Lal PathLabs Ltd.
stocks.thesis: #1 quality diagnostic chain in India. Asset-light hub-and-spoke; Dr Lal family + WestBridge backed.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 50× rich but stock 40%+ off 2022 highs; aggregator margin pressure stabilising.

stocks.name: Navin Fluorine International
stocks.thesis: Fluorine specialty chemistry niche (refrigerants, AHF, pharma + agrochem intermediates). Mafatlal-promoted, 60+y tenure.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 54× rich; stock ~50% off 2022 highs. Wait for chem-cycle turn confirmation.

stocks.name: Mphasis Ltd.
stocks.thesis: BFSI-focused IT services; Blackstone owns 56% — top-tier PE governance.
stocks.valueAngle: Cheapest of IT pass-list: P/E 22× · Div yield 2.9% · ROE 18% — pessimism already priced.

stocks.name: Coforge Ltd.
stocks.thesis: Mid-tier IT niche-vertical specialist (travel/transport/insurance); Baring PE ~40%. Cidara acquisition (2024) adds US presence.
stocks.valueAngle: P/E 29× · ROE 18.6% · Op margin 16.6%; watch FY27 margin recovery.
